title: StatVault AI
challenge: Processing massive football datasets to extract meaningful insights for match prediction and player evaluation.
solution: Developed a comprehensive ML pipeline featuring XGBoost for match outcomes and K-Means for player profiling.
results: Achieved 67.7% Accuracy and 0.811 ROC-AUC for match prediction
Clustered players into 6 distinct archetypes using K-Means
learnings: Advanced feature engineering for time-series sports data
Optimizing XGBoost hyperparameters for multi-class classification
Applying unsupervised learning for real-world user segmentation
